calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Thomas Worth for Petitioner.

The Court sets forth the matter and expressed its concern that funds were transferred out of probate estate without a court order. Mr. Worth stated the assets going into the Trust are for the spouse so she felt she could go ahead and transfer the funds. The Court noted that although there were no objections and perhaps the court would have approved this, it was a breach of fiduciary obligation and the court does not approve her actions as a personal representative.

The Report of Executors on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission subject to the court adjusting language on the order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.
